TimeDeviceTemperatureStatusActuator
{{ ev.created_at | datefmt }} {{ ev.devices.device_name if ev.devices else '—' }} {{ ev.temperature ~ ' °C' if ev.temperature is not none else '—' }} {{ ev.status }} {{ '✓ Yes' if ev.actuator_triggered else 'No' }}
{% else %}

No environmental events found.

{% endif %}

TimeDeviceTitleSeverityResolved
{{ a.created_at | datefmt }} {{ a.devices.device_name if a.devices else '—' }} {{ a.title }} {{ a.severity }} {{ '✓' if a.resolved_at else '—' }}
{% else %}

{% endif %}
